description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a detached garage connected by a paved driveway. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard with a play area, benches, and a small playhouse. The front of the house has a prominent entryway with steps leading up to the main door, and the driveway accommodates a car parked outside the garage. The exterior is primarily white with some gray and beige accents, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The backyard is landscaped with grass, a circular patio, and various outdoor furniture. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a play area and patio. The exterior is white with gray and beige accents, and the design is open and contemporary.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the house with the main entryway, driveway, car, and detached garage clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, revealing the full length of the driveway, garage, and the backyard with its play area and patio.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the backyard, showcasing the play area, benches, circular patio, and the rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the backyard, playhouse, and the connection between the house and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a prominent door, and a small overhang; minimalistic and modern design.
